author: michalzx
title: Windows self-hosted runner ECONNREFUSED on GitHub artifact service

failed_jobs.name: OpenVINO Python API Tests (3.12)
failed_jobs.error: Failed to ListArtifacts: Unable to make request: ECONNREFUSED

failed_jobs.name: OpenVINO tokenizers extension / OpenVINO tokenizers extension
failed_jobs.error: Failed to CreateArtifact: Unable to make request: ECONNREFUSED

root_cause: Self-hosted Windows AKS runner (aks-win-8-cores-16gb-test-wdwfq-runner-r69ng) lost network connectivity to GitHub Actions artifact service. Both DOWNLOAD and UPLOAD operations returned ECONNREFUSED. This is a transient infrastructure failure unrelated to the PR changes (docs-only update).
